message.content:
In the project at D:\project\info-gitlab\oa, search for the AI daily report summary trigger logic. Look for:
1. Any code related to "has_summary", "check" endpoint for daily reports, or AI summary generation
2. Search in both oa-server and oa-core for daily-report related controllers, jobs, or services
3. Look for queue jobs or event listeners that trigger after a daily report is created
4. Check the seed-test-data.js directory (D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\myfeatrue\已上线\0331-AI日报) for any related files that explain the flow

Report back what triggers the AI summary and why it might not be triggering for these seeded reports.
